package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerIoOperationsTemporaryFileForStreamTransform() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_io_operations_temporary_file_for_stream_transform"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: I/O operations. Flag temporary files used only to bridge streaming transformations."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
